notes: Each ignored vulnerability MUST be matched by a TODO row in requirements.txt explaining why the bump is deferred and what blocks it.
cryptography==43.0.1 → tracked TODO in requirements.txt L34-37.
langchain-core==1.2.31 → tracked in requirements.txt L67-68 (current pin was bumped from 1.2.25 to 1.2.31 for an earlier CVE).
Bump-blocker: major version jump 5.x→6.x risks breaking the existing beautifulsoup4 usage. Audit follow-up.
Likely a quick win — python-dotenv is a tiny pure-Python lib.
Closed by C4 cycle 2 (this commit, fastapi 0.115.6→0.136.3, starlette 1.2.0):
All three vanished once starlette was pulled at 1.2.0 transitively.
Process to add a new entry:
1. Add the real vuln ID to ignored_ids (CVE/PYSEC/GHSA from the pip-audit JSON).
2. Add or update a TODO row in requirements.txt with the bump-blocker reason.
3. Document it above with package + fix version.
